kind"],"similarityValue":0,"id":2,"type":"forward","messages":[{"role":"assistant","content":"To prove that Fae is not kind, we need to follow the logical connections given in the problem statement:\n\n1. **Numpuses are Tumpuses.**\n2. **Each Tumpus is not melodic.**\n3. **Each Numpus is rainy.**\n4. **Every Wumpus is cold.**\n5. **Each Wumpus is a Lempus.**\n6. **Every Lempus is not spicy.**\n7. **Sterpuses are not kind.**\n8. **Every Lorpus is a Zumpus.**\n9. **Every Lorpus is opaque.**\n10. **Every Wumpus is a Sterpus.**\n11. **Every Sterpus is a Brimpus.**\n12. **Numpuses are Wumpuses.**\n13. **Every Impus is large.**\n14. **Every Shumpus is an Impus.**\n15. **Shumpuses are Numpuses.**\n16. **Every Shumpus is bright.**\n17. **Every Grimpus is wooden.**\n18. **Each Sterpus is a Grimpus.**\n19. **Fae is a Shumpus.**\n20. **Fae is a Lorpus.**\n\nLet's proceed step-by-step:\n\n- From 19, we know that **Fae is a Shumpus**.\n- From 15, we know that **Shumpuses are Numpuses**, so Fae is a Numpus.\n- From 12, we know that **Numpuses are Wumpuses**, so Fae is a Wumpus.\n- From 10, we know that **Every Wumpus is a Sterpus**, so Fae is a Sterpus.\n- From 7, we know that **Sterpuses are not kind**.\n\nThus, since Fae is a Sterpus and Sterpuses are not kind, we can conclude that **Fae is not kind**."}],"parents":[1],"children":[3],"textembedding":[-0.016540779,-0.09166083,-0.059506793,0.012266911,0.045430306,-0.12585177,-0.026807155,-0.10628291,0.026734408,0.07231021,0.027425501,0.18594053,-0.061507326,0.056487802,-0.019805286,0.04015617,-0.03066273,0.10271832,-0.12490606,0.0044193612,-0.13421763,0.054560017,0.04361164,-0.027425501,0.050740816,0.019259686,0.033154305,-0.0588157,-0.060998097,0.061761938,0.031735744,-0.031990357,0.0401198,-0.024697501,-0.07936664,-0.04481196,0.11173891,0.01033003,-0.08933293,0.10664665,-0.042993292,0.019477926,-0.034736544,0.1076651,-0.03028081,-0.09951747,0.012348751,0.0066745086,0.08184002,0.03240865,-0.029553343,-0.07551106,0.0120577635,0.0989355,0.09602563,0.07110989,0.005355975,-0.08671405,0.023188008,-0.06790903,-0.036882572,-0.04372076,-0.13530885,0.03289969,0.056269564,0.0048331083,0.02120566,0.030626357,-0.0041261013,-0.07401975,-0.041174628,0.062416658,0.004567128,0.00026768507,0.07798445,0.032917876,0.14301999,0.035009343,0.026425235,-0.03819201,-0.013867337,-0.09086061,0.05055895,-0.035427637,0.10708313,0.03488204,-0.051977508,-0.14767578,0.043357026,-0.0401198,0.036700703,0.008297669,-0.056451432,-0.06685421,-0.07522008,0.08060333,0.09798979,0.017031819,0.07078253,0.043211535,0.040556278,0.07965762,-0.112320885,-0.015976992,0.044848334,0.004587588,0.028553076,0.14440218,-0.014267445,0.2655254,-0.026770782,0.026025128,-0.14411119,-0.048485667,0.0811853,-0.027207261,-0.02071462,-0.07278306,-0.0005836785,0.10177262,0.0811853,0.04361164,-0.007247389,0.0626349,-0.021187473,0.03761004,-0.0015254072,0.032972436,-0.058597457,-0.08605933,-0.043902628,-0.012794324,0.06321687,0.0014208338,0.0006774535,0.019605232,-0.0976988,-0.014112858,-0.02295158,0.09100611,0.007397429,-0.04579404,0.089769416,-0.036409717,-0.03804652,-0.065399274,-0.005901575,0.10279107,0.019714354,0.049067643,-0.004723988,0.066344984,0.037573665,0.04772183,0.035773184,-0.042556815,-0.039610572,-0.056815162,0.080748826,0.017368272,-0.033172492,-0.0719
